metadata.description: Wave-based planning and parallel build orchestration for Claude Code. Entry point: /ai-lore.

plugins.name: ai-lore
plugins.description: ai-lore, ai-lore-plan-waves, ai-lore-build-waves, ai-lore-cleanup, ai-lore-config, and ai-lore-document: decompose work into parallel waves of atomic tasks, build them with gated sub-agents, ship the result, and document the codebase with parallel directory agents. Codebase-agnostic and config-driven.
